channel.title: Infinite Wave Mastering - SRC Comparisons
channel.description: Comparisons of the performance of software and hardware sample rate converters.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Creative WaveStudio 7 and Smarc 3.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Adobe Audtition 10 (CC 2017), Bitwig 1.3, Ferocious Resampler and Pyramix 10.

item.title: New Addition to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Reaper 5.

item.title: New Addition to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Pro Audio Converter from Mark V Apps.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Ableton Live 9.73, Bitwig 2.1.4, Reaper 5.51, Studio One 2.51 and Cubase 9. More to come soon.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Amadeus Pro 2.4.2, Sonar 23.10, Cubase 9.5, Protools 2018, Acoustica 7.0.51, TASCAM Hi-res Editor 1.03, Logic Pro X 10.3.2, Native Instruments Kontakt 5.7.1 R35, WaveLab 9.5.10 Build 17, Studio One 3 -, Presence XT And Propellerhead Reason 9.5. Whew!

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for ffmpeg 3.4.2 (swr), Frankl resample_soxr, Hofa CD Burn & DDP 1.6.10, Lake People DAT RS 05, XRECODE 3 [64-bit] 1.77 SWR and XRECODE 3 [64-bit] 1.77 SOX. Thanks to everyone that contributed conversions for us.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Hofa CD Burn & DDP 1.6.10, Hofa CD Burn & DDP 2.0.4, and Fission 2.4.1. Thanks to everyone that contributed conversions for us.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: We just added results for Windows 10 DS Converter, Cubase 10, and several conversions for EZ CD Audio Converter 8.0.6.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page, and a correction.
item.description: We just added results for Adobe Audition 2019, Bitwig 2.4.3, KFR 3.0.2 (C++ library), and a new conversion from Cubase 10, as there was an issue with the last one.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page...
item.description: Courtesy of the current lockdown, I have finally had time to post some of the results backlog. These include: Sequoia 14 (UH-2), r8brain2, Ableton Live 10.1, iZotope RX6, FL Studio 20.1.2.877, several conversion from EZ CD 8.3, and a whack of different ones from FooDSP. More results to follow (fairly) soon.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: 24 new conversions from Protools 2019, Reaper 6, r8brain 2.2, Pipewire, Sample Manager 3.4.1, Soundforge 11,12 and 13, Samplitude Pro X3, Twisted Wave (ios), Audio Mastering (ios), Audition 2018, dbPowerAmp 17 Beta, EZ CD Audio Converter 9.1, Hawksford Spectral Domain, and the Lurssen Mastering Console

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: 7 new conversions from Ardour 5, ffmpeg 4.2.2, Hawksford Spectral Domain, LMMS 1.2.1 and Vegas 17

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: New conversions from Myriad 4.4, Myriad 4.6 (Apple), Myriad 4.6 (Zynaptic) and Tracktion Waveform 10

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Two new conversions from iZotope RX 8.1. 'Default' and 'Intermediate Phase'

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: 5 new conversions from Audacity 2.4.2, Nuendo 11, and three conversions from r8brain Pro 2.9.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: New conversions added to the page from Acon Digital Acoustica 7.3, Audacity 3, Adobe Audition 14, Renoise 3.3.1, Sequoia 15, Wavelab Pro 10 and an extreme setting for iZotope RX 7 (MP, steepness = 2000, cutoff = 0.99).

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: New conversions added to the page from foobar2000 RetroArch, Logic Pro 10.6.2, Protools 2021, SoundEngine Free 5 and Tracktion Waveform PRO 11.5.17.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Two new conversions added to the page from Pipewire 0.3.47 (Quality 4 and 10).

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Three new conversions added to the page from Acon Digital Acoustica 7.4, Spectral Layers 9.0.10 and XLD 10.4.

item.title: New Functionality
item.description: The two converters initially displayed are now randomized.

item.title: New Functionality
item.description: EMBED button has been added. This copies a link to the current view to the clipboard.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: EMBED button has been added. This copies a link to the current view to the clipboard.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Three new conversions added to the page from Audio Resampling Tool (Presets 2 and 4) and Gold Wave 6.7.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Three new conversions were added to the SRC page today. Nuendo 12, Logic Pro for iPad, and Wavelab Elements 11.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Two new conversions were added to the SRC page today. MainConcept TotalCode Studio 5.3.0 and Magix Sequoia 16.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Two new conversions were added to the SRC page today. Camilla DSP and Digital Performer 11.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: New conversions were added to the SRC page today. UAD LUNA 16, and conversions from Chrome, Firefox and Safari browsers on Mac.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: New conversions were added to the SRC page today: Cubase 14, Nuendo 13, FFMPEG 7.1, Renoise 3.5, Sequoia 17, SpectralLayers Pro 11, Wavelab Pro 12, r8brain Pro 2.12, and Zynaptiq Triumph 3 KSRC.

item.title: New Additions to the SRC page
item.description: Eight new conversions were added to the SRC page today: FinalCD 0.29, Propellerhead Reason 13, iZotope RX 9, iZotope RX 11, DSP .939 bandwidth, EZ CD Audio Converter 12, fre:ac 1.1.7, and DaVinci Resolve 2.0.
